title: hydrocotyle muriculata
intro: Hydrocotyle muriculata, also known as Gotu Kola, is a plant species within the hydrocotyle genus, native to Australia and Asia, which is characterized by its small, round leaves and creeping stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle muriculata include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced risk of certain neurological disorders. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw supplement.
